Technology sector leads intraday performance (NVDA +1.7%, TSLA +2.5%). Finance (JPM -0.6%) and Energy (XOM -0.5%) lag. MSFT ($393.71) and GOOG ($328.98) trade at premiums relative to AAPL ($258.08).

**PORTFOLIO REVIEW**
Cash allocation ($90,994) represents 91% of equity. P&L is negligible (+$50.25). Current positions are underweight (5-10 shares). No stop-loss adjustments required given low exposure.

Sector concentration is balanced (Tech, Finance, Energy, Health, Auto). Cash buffer mitigates volatility. No sector over-concentration detected. No imminent macro risks identified in current data.

**MARKET ASSESSMENT**

**PORTFOLIO REVIEW**
Cash allocation is high (88.3%). P&L is +$35.38. All positions are within acceptable daily variance (-0.9% to +2.1%). No stop tightening required. NVDA and TSLA are primary profit drivers.

3. **MSFT**: Buy @ $394.57. Rationale: Diversification within Tech sector. Target: $405. Stop: $380.

**WATCHLIST UPDATE**

**RISK CHECK**
